narrative:
Precinct Lake (precinct in Logan County) has 464 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.9 percentage points.
